arts.ttl: Man United, West Ham 'interested' in signing "upset" Bayern Munich midfielder
arts.sum: Man United and West Ham are put on red alert as Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl admits that Leon Goretzka is "upset" with his lack of game time at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany doesn’t shy from high expectations
arts.sum: But Kompany lives and breathes high stakes football. As Bayern Munich rounds into its 2024/25 Champions League campaign, Vincent Kompany will face the same task his predecessors could not deliver on: a UCL trophy.

arts.ttl: Report: Leroy Sané unhappy with contract proposal from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report from CaughtOffside, Leroy Sané is “not happy” with the latest contract offer from Bayern Munich, which is said to include a pay cut. Arsenal and Newcastle United remain interested in Bayern Munich winger Leroy Sane and could move for him as he nears the end of his contract at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Kimmich, Palhinha or Pavlović? Vincent Kompany's midfield dilemma at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: After three matches of 2024/25, Kimmich has successfully won the most challenges of Bayern's defensive midfield options (54 percent), had the third-most touches of the ball in the league (321), and covered the third-most distance of any Bundesliga player (36.8 km). It was once seen as being a problem position for Bayern, but a major new signing and the development of a brilliant young talent have left Vincent Kompany with the tricky task of managing a wealth of defensive midfielders that rivals that of his attacking riches.

arts.ttl: Man United keen on signing Bayern Munich star who is ‘upset’ at Allianz Arena
arts.sum: According to The Sun, Manchester United and West Ham United are interested in signing Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka. The German midfielder is upset at the Allianz Arena because of his lack of playing time at the club. The German giants have preferred Aleksandar Pavlovic as their main midfielder in that position and the signing […] The post Man United keen on signing Bayern Munich star who is ‘upset’ at Allianz Arena appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany: Facing Bayern shoulld be "almost impossible mission"
arts.sum: Speaking about his long-term goals at Bayern Munich, Vincent Kompany says he wants opponents to think they are "almost impossible" to beat.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich registers List B players for Champions League
arts.sum: Players aged 16 may be submitted if they have been registered with the club for the previous two years without interruption. A player may be registered on List B if he is born on, or after, 1 January 2003 and has been eligible to play for the club concerned for any uninterrupted period of two years since his 15th birthday by the time he is registered with UEFA – or for a total of three consecutive years with a maximum of one loan period to a club from the same association for a period not longer than one year.

arts.ttl: Eberl on Palhinha's start to life at Bayern: "He needed time"
arts.sum: Max Eberl has explained why Bayern Munich need to be patient with Joao Palhinha and why he's expected to play such an important role in the future.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl underlines his desire to fine tune the club’s operation rather building it back up from the ground
arts.sum: Fresh off witnessing new head Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany mastermind a thrilling 6-1 victory over newly promoted Bundesliga side Holstein Kiel, Max Eberl sat down with Sport1 Doppelpass to speak about several topics. [What has made Bayern so great, a unity of quality and the capacities the club has, along with the decision makers at the club, we are trying to unite that.] Vincent Kompany will get the time for that - this is the statement from Bayern Munich, not from Max Eberl.”

arts.ttl: “Almost impossible mission” to play against Bayern Munich per Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: For Kompany, he referred back to his playing days in communicating how Bayern Munich’s opponents can sometimes feel. With the teams who have won it in recent years, there are a few who will obviously aim for the same, but it’s a special venue for the final and there is a special feeling here about the Champions League.”
